Overview

Dashboard

Live counts load from your platform data. No demo statistics are used.

Students--users collection
Total Roadmaps--roadmaps collection
Published Roadmaps--visible when published
Draft Roadmaps--admin drafts
Opportunities--opportunities collection
Resources--resources collection
Events--events collection
Stories--stories collection

Select Manage beside a roadmap to build its learning journey.

User management

Search, filter, and review registered users.

Total Registered Users--Loaded from registered accounts

Student Profile

Select a student

Profile details will appear here.

Content

Program Roadmaps

Create, edit, delete, and publish roadmaps.

Create Roadmap

Add a new programme roadmap.

Edit Roadmaps

Update roadmap titles, skills, and related resources from the table.

Delete Roadmaps

Remove retired or incorrect roadmap drafts.

Publish Roadmaps

Review draft roadmaps and publish them to students.

Roadmaps load from your content library.
TitleProgrammeLevelStatusLast UpdatedActions
Loading roadmaps...
Listings

Opportunities

Add, edit, delete, and publish opportunities.

Add Opportunity

Create internships, scholarships, fellowships, jobs, and calls.

Edit Opportunities

Update details, deadlines, links, and publishing status from the table.

Delete Opportunities

Remove expired, duplicate, or incorrect opportunities.

Opportunities load from your listings library.
TitleOrganizationTypeProgrammeLevelDeadlineStatusActions
Loading opportunities...
Library

Resources

Upload PDFs and learning materials, then edit or delete them.

Upload Material

Prepare PDFs, guides, books, checklists, and learning resources.

Edit Resources

Edit resource metadata, categories, visibility, and files.

Delete Resources

Remove outdated PDFs and learning materials.

Resources load from your library.
TitleProgrammeLevelCategoryTypeStatusUploaded DateActions
Loading resources...
Publishing

Stories

Publish student success stories and news.

New Story

Create news, updates, and student success stories.

Editorial Queue

Review drafts before publishing.

Stories load from your publishing queue.
TitleCategoryAuthorStatusCreated AtActions
Loading stories...
Calendar

Events

Create and manage events.

Create Event

Add title, date, venue, host, and registration details.

Manage Events

Edit, publish, postpone, or archive events.

Events load from your calendar.
TitleDateVenueHostStatusCreated AtActions
Loading events...
Moderation

Community

Moderate posts and comments.

Review Posts

Moderate reported posts and student discussions.

Review Comments

Moderate comments and community replies.

Community items load from your moderation queue.
TitleAuthorCategoryStatusCreated AtActions
Loading community items...
Commerce

Marketplace

Manage student marketplace listings.

Listings

Approve, reject, feature, or remove marketplace listings.

Marketplace listings load from your commerce queue.
TitleSellerCategoryPriceStatusCreated AtActions
Loading marketplace listings...
Broadcasts

Announcements

Create announcements visible to students.

Announcements load from your broadcasts.
TitleAudienceStatusCreated AtActions
Loading announcements...
Access

Admins

View admins, invite new admins, and assign permissions.

View Admins

Admins are approved accounts with admin access.

Invite Admin

Create the user first, then set their role to admin in their profile.

Permissions

Assign section-level permissions when roles are expanded.

Admins load from registered accounts.
Full NameEmailUniversityCountryRoleDate Joined
Loading admins...
Configuration

Settings

Website settings, contact information, social links, and branding.

Settings load from your website configuration.
